recommendations.title: Conduct Board-Level Review of AT-1 Bond Exposure
recommendations.description: Initiate a comprehensive board-level review of Yes Bank AT-1 bond exposure totaling ₹1,630.2 Cr, focusing on regulatory compliance gaps and risk mitigation by 2026-05-15 to avoid penalties up to ₹965 Cr as per SEBI precedent (BRSR:P6:Q14).
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹965 Cr regulatory penalty by proactive compliance review; ROI ~480%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer banks initiated similar reviews post-SEBI settlements to avoid ₹500-1000 Cr penalties

audit_trail.value: ₹1,630.2 Cr exposure and ₹964.6 Cr penalty precedent from SEBI settlement

recommendations.title: Monitor AT-1 Bond Exposure and Escalate if >₹500 Cr Risk
recommendations.description: Implement monthly monitoring of AT-1 bond exposure; escalate to board if risk exceeds ₹500 Cr within 6 months to proactively manage regulatory and reputational risks.
recommendations.profitability_link: Early risk detection can avoid ₹200-300 Cr indirect margin and reputational losses
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors established exposure thresholds post-SEBI events to trigger risk mitigation

audit_trail.value: ₹1,630.2 Cr sector exposure and ₹665.6 Cr indirect risk

recommendations.title: File SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report on Time
recommendations.description: Ensure timely filing of SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report by 2026-07-15 to demonstrate improved controls and transparency, reducing risk of further regulatory penalties and trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹50-100 Cr potential penalties and trading restrictions by maintaining compliance
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peers maintained timely SEBI filings to avoid trading halts post-bond controversies

audit_trail.value: SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report deadline 2026-07-15
